title: A bill to designate the mountain at the Devils Tower National Monument, Wyoming, as Devils Tower, and for other purposes.
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources.
plain_summary: This bill officially names the mountain at Devils Tower National Monument in Wyoming as Devils Tower. The government will use this name in all future papers and records when talking about the mountain and the area around it. This makes Devils Tower the official name that everyone in the government must use.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources.

sections.title: Section 1 Designation of Devils Tower
sections.text: The mountain at Devils Tower National Monument in Wyoming will be officially called Devils Tower. This includes the mountain located at coordinates forty-four degrees thirty-five minutes twenty-six seconds north by one hundred four degrees forty-two minutes fifty-five seconds west, and the area at coordinates forty-four degrees thirty-five minutes twenty-one seconds north by one hundred four degrees forty-one minutes forty-eight seconds west. From now on, whenever any United States law, map, government rule, order, document, paper, or other official record mentions this mountain and area, it will refer to it as Devils Tower.
